_meta..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.hasChildren(['driverId', 'passengerId']) && newData.child('driverId').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && !newData.exists() && (data.child('driverId').val() === auth.uid || data.child('passengerId').val() === auth.uid)) || (data.exists() && newData.exists() && data.child('driverId').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('driverId').val() === data.child('driverId').val() && newData.child('passengerId').val() === data.child('passengerId').val()))

driver_location..write: auth != null && (newData.exists() && root.child('telemetry/active_rides/' + $rideId + '/_meta/driverId').val() === auth.uid || !newData.exists() && (root.child('telemetry/active_rides/' + $rideId + '/_meta/driverId').val() === auth.uid || root.child('telemetry/active_rides/' + $rideId + '/_meta/passengerId').val() === auth.uid))
driver_location..validate: newData.hasChildren(['lat', 'lng', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('lat').isNumber() && newData.child('lng').isNumber() && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber() && (!newData.hasChild('heading') || newData.child('heading').isNumber()) && (!newData.hasChild('speed') || newData.child('speed').isNumber())
